name: Instagram Engagement Rate Calculator
description: Measure engagement percentage for your posts.

example.explanation: Engagement rate measures how actively followers interact with posts.

faqs.question: What is a good engagement rate?
faqs.answer: It varies by audience size, but 1–5% is generally considered healthy.

faqs.question: How can I improve engagement?
faqs.answer: Post consistently, interact with followers, and use content formats your audience likes.

faqs.question: Does this include saves?
faqs.answer: This calculator uses likes, comments, and shares. Saves may also be counted in some metrics.
